hero.tagline: From front-end to back-end — fullstack websites, APIs and systems — with the same rigor in low-level engineering (Rust, C, C++), data and AI.

about.label: About
about.title: An engineer focused on correctness, performance and systems that matter.
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineering student at the University of Brasília (FCTE), currently in my 6th semester. I work across web development, software in high- and low-level languages, ETL and web scraping, plus data standardization to support decision-making.
about.p2: I have hands-on experience with Docker, AWS and Git, work in agile teams and was awarded at an MLH international hackathon. I like going deep: compilers, graphics engines, blockchain and computer vision in Rust.

rust.note: Rust is my favorite language — Ferris hangs around here.

work.label: Experience
work.title: Where I put it all to work.

points: Developed and deployed applications, ensuring high-quality code and functionality.
Collaborated with the team to design and implement innovative solutions using agile methodologies.
Continuous learning and improvement in software engineering principles.
Web scraping and ETL to extract data from Google Scholar, applied to the University of Aging.
Automated collection and organization of academic information (papers, research and professional data).
Converted data into standardized Excel tables to support researcher recruitment.

events.text: Representing DW Corp, I shared experiences and challenges from an advanced web project already in production, focused on practical learnings and professional growth.
Award-winning project among 117 projects and 356 participants. A solution for onboarding and understanding large code repositories, with automated analysis and contextual explanations.

work.gallery_hint: Add photos to public/gallery/ and list them in src/data/gallery.ts
